message:
style(export-config): restore line-continuation layout in augment_path_for_target_user

A prior edit collapsed the `for dir in ...` loop body onto a
single unreadable line. Restore the backslash-continued multi-line
layout to match the identical for-loop in cheatsheet.sh / info.sh
/ smoke_test.sh / status.sh. No behaviour change — shell word
splitting produces the same list in both forms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -461,7 +461,15 @@ augment_path_for_target_user() {
 
     [[ -n "$target_home" ]] || return 0
 
-    for dir in         "$primary_bin_dir"         "$target_home/.local/bin"         "$target_home/.acfs/bin"         "$target_home/.bun/bin"         "$target_home/.cargo/bin"         "$target_home/go/bin"         "$target_home/.atuin/bin"         "$target_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin"; do
+    for dir in \
+        "$primary_bin_dir" \
+        "$target_home/.local/bin" \
+        "$target_home/.acfs/bin" \
+        "$target_home/.bun/bin" \
+        "$target_home/.cargo/bin" \
+        "$target_home/go/bin" \
+        "$target_home/.atuin/bin" \
+        "$target_home/google-cloud-sdk/bin"; do
         [[ -d "$dir" ]] || continue
         case "$seen_path" in
             *":$dir:"*) ;;
